Ballistics Meta: Los AD5B siguen siendo intocables por su capacidad de penetración de escudos.

missions.name: Green light on [TARGET]
missions.overview:
Word's come down through my bosses that we're settling old debts. I've got an open line on this old-time hitter named [TARGET] who's racked up a hefty kill list. We caught wind that they were hiding out with some people over at [LOCATION] who aren't the biggest fans of us, so they probably won't take kindly to you. [TARGET] is the target here, but you might have to mix it up with them.

Again, whenever we've tried to take out [TARGET], they've killed their killer. I feel like you'll fare better, but I'd bring backup if you got it.

Good luck.

-Stows

missions.name: Halt Narcotics Operation
missions.overview:
Citizens for Prosperity has been working hard to improve people's lives across the system, but an already difficult task becomes near impossible when drugs get involved. We've recently seen a dealer specifically targeting our most vulnerable and have experienced setbacks across the board. This needs to stop.

We would like you to go to [LOCATION] and put a permanent end to their production line.

Do this and we can hopefully get our people back on track. 
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

missions.name: Handle Vanduul Attack on Ship
missions.overview:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship
Briefing: An operator working with InterSec is currently being attacked by Vanduul ships at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. The likelihood of them surviving on their own is low, so we’re looking for a contractor willing to provide combat support.  

Contractors accepting this mission should be well supplied and ready to face the Vanduul threat head-on. 

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

missions.name: Hauling ask.
missions.overview:
You been doing good work for us, so I got a favor to ask. I'll still pay you, but it's a favor. Got some cargo that needs to get bounced from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and the guy that was supposed to do it found himself on the wrong side of an airlock, but hey, shit still needs to get done.

Only thing is you'll need a ship that can carry <EM4>4 SCU cargo containers</EM4>.  A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

If you could sort it out for me, that'd be great.

- Stows out

missions.overview:
A distress call just came in from [LOCATION] claiming that a large Headhunter force has just attacked our outpost there. There have been multiple deaths and injuries from those who managed to flee the scene. We're looking for any available security personnel to head there and retake the outpost.

Witness accounts identified the attackers as elite Headhunter enforcers, so watch yourself out there and bring help if you can. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

missions.name: ShipWaveAttack ClearOutHostiles Nyx VE
missions.overview:
Recently we've had incident reports of numerous Citizens for Prosperity contractors in the system having run-ins with an outlaw hunting party operating out of [LOCATION]. 

To help re-establish safer routes through that sector, you will be dispatched to head there and engage with these outlaws. The group is known to travel in smaller packs, so its important that you and whatever backup you bring wait in the area to deal with all of them or else there's a chance the threat will remain. 

Thank you for helping us,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

missions.name: Help Headhunters at [LOCATION]
missions.overview:
Got word that Headhunters ships heading to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> are coming under attack. Scans have revealed enemy forces in the wider region intent on targeting our ops. 

There’s enough of them that it’s gonna take more than one person to clear away all that trash. If you can grab your gear and a few friends, I could really use you out there.  

The specific attack areas and targets are evolving. Don’t worry about the details now. Just get there and I’ll let you know where you’re needed.  

Handle this right and I’ll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>14 Council Scrip</EM4>.

- Stows

missions.name: Help Headhunters Prospect
missions.overview:
Guess some folks just can’t dogfight. Sent a young prospect out on patrol, and am now being barraged with comms about how they’re barely hanging on. Had them update me with the details about who they’re up against and I damn near fell outta my chair laughing.

missions.overview:
Got word that outlaws are attempting to overrun <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. There’s local security forces there, but they’re struggling to stop that attack.

Need a contractor to hustle there and help take care of the aggressors. Bring plenty of gear, and be careful when engaging targets. Don’t want to hear about any security team members getting caught in your crossfire.    

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

missions.name: EchhartSecurity Nyx Hard RecoverCargo
missions.overview:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Got a transport in need of backup over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Signal was patchy, but their comms made it sound like a group of outlaws had gotten wind of what they were hauling and attempted to take it from them.

Considering the state of things before we lost contact, I'm considering this a recovery mission. Multiple hostiles are expected at the site, so a skilled crew is crucial for the success of this operation. There will be a high volume of cargo to deal with, so a ship that can carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> will be needed. 

Upon successful extraction of cargo, deliver to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

missions.name: High-Risk Bounty: [TARGET]
missions.overview:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Bounty
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We’ve received actionable intelligence on a dangerous bounty, who’s turned out to be extremely elusive. <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> was spotted with a dedicated contingent of known associates at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We’re looking for a contractor ready and willing to execute this bounty before they disappear again.

Based on previous attempts to apprehend this criminal, there’s a good chance that <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> will try to avoid a direct confrontation, and instead send their allies to confront you. We believe that neutralizing these protective forces, and shredding the safety net they provide, is the best way to draw out <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> to face you directly. 

Expect to confront a significant and skilled force. We advise that you plan accordingly. Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

missions.overview:

CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Recently, we sent a contractor after a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, who was leading a crew targeting the operations of an extremely important client. Unfortunately, it was a trap and we lost some good people. We can’t let the target get away again, so we’ve decided the best course of action is to give them a dose of their own medicine.  

Ambushing this target seems like the safest course of action, and we’ve identified a good spot for such an attack. There’s an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that the target and their crew frequently fly by. You can power down your ship and hide there until you’re ready to strike. It would be best for you to bring a few trusted friends to help handle this crew.

missions.name: Hunt Some Heads
missions.overview:
Got some asshole’s trying to push us out of the system. You up for pushing back?

See, there are some folks who really don’t want us here, and have started sending out hunting parties of five to seven ships, often with a bigger gun ship, to places where we’re building up our presence. Time for us to show that we’re here to stay.  

I’ve strung together a few spots starting at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD where we’re seeing the most hostile encounters. Need you to visit each one and scan to see if we can bait them into a fight.

Know this is going to be a hard one, so don't be cocky and try to go it alone. If I were you, I'd bring at least <EM4>three friends</EM4> onboard for support. To make it worth your while, I'm promising a bonus of <EM4>16 Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor that pulls it off. 

- Stows

missions.name: Pyro Easy RecoverCargo
missions.overview:
Life is tough on the frontier, and every delivery to our settlers is important. We really can't afford to lose any more this year.

One of our key suppliers has been hit by a group of outlaws over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and gone silent on us. I fear the worst, but if we can still recover the supplies they were transporting, it could make a huge difference.

Chances are the outlaws who attacked them are still lurking around there so be on your guard. Once you've dealt with them, grab the cargo and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Make sure you're flying a ship that can carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> too.

Fly safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Rayari Incorporated is looking for independent contractors to provide additional support in our efforts to push the boundaries of science, agriculture, and medicine in the Empire and beyond.

missions.name: Jackpot
missions.overview:
Looking for a hauler to pick up some cargo for me. Thing is, there’s a catch.

The cargo’s in the back of an abandoned ship located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. As you may have figured, this ain’t our cargo, but it sure as hell doesn’t deserve to go to anyone else. I’ll be damned if those CFP assholes get their hands on it before we do.

missions.name: Jorrit Dossier: Onyx Personnel Files
missions.overview:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A client has requested that Hockrow compile a complete dossier on infamous scientist <EM4>Dr. Logan Jorrit</EM4>. Believed responsible for the incidents at Associated Science & Development’s Lazarus site, the client is eager to get a broader view of Dr. Logan and his research.

Contract Investigator Actions: 
Gain access to ASD’s shuttered <EM4>Onyx Facility</EM4> where Dr. Jorrit was formerly the Lead Scientist.  Once there, locate and <EM4>access the research lab’s personnel files</EM4> so that we can get an overview of what was going on there.

Additional Notes:
The QT beacon to the site was deactivated when the facility went dark so you'll have to fly the last leg manually.

While ASD has formally closed the facility, caution is still advised. Not only may the labs themselves be hazardous, but the surrounding area shows signs of recent visitors. Scavengers or squatters may be on site.

I've also managed to wrangle an employee ID code for you so as long as you're on the job, you'll be able to access the computers there. 

Additionally, Onyx Facility only has large hangars available, so plan your travel appropriately.

missions.name: Jorrit Dossier: Power Usage Data
missions.overview:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
The seismic data you extracted had some interesting revelations. My expert says she thinks that Jorrit might have been excavating down there. Hate to think what he’s doing, but it's our job to find out. I think we’re close to cracking this, so I want you to go back to Onyx and gather the Power Usage data. If we can track energy flow from the last couple months, a pattern should reveal itself.

missions.name: Jorrit Dossier: Project Hyperion
missions.overview:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
All your digging around Onyx has paid off. I’ve been able to confirm that Jorrit has been operating an off-the-record lab in the facility’s Site-B in order to conduct an experiment he calls “Project Hyperion.” I’ll send his <EM4>lab notes to your mobiGlas journal</EM4> once you’re underway, but the long and short of it is the bastard is trying to make Humans evolve or some nonsense like that.

The client wants the experimental data, so you’re going back to Onyx and do everything needed to get Project Hyperion up and running. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Prep the experiment by collecting a <EM4>Reagent code from the Engineering wing</EM4> and a <EM4>Catalyst code from the Research wing</EM4>.

Once you have those, head down to the <EM4>Lab in Site-B</EM4> and <EM4>run the experiment</EM4> so you can <EM4>upload the results</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Since this is an active lab, there might be ASD security on-site.
 
Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

missions.name: Journeyman Tracker License Certification
missions.overview:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: [SYSTEM] 
RISK ASSESSMENT: High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: As your standing in the community continues to grow, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn a Journeyman Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend High-Risk Targets (HRT). These criminals can travel in larger multicrew ships with several escorts. The additional offensive and defensive capabilities make them difficult targets for all but the most skilled guild members.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend a HRT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

missions.name: Knock Out New Drug Op
missions.overview:
Some folks will do anything for a few creds. There’s a group of upstart outlaws over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that have decided to start manufacturing drugs. Turns out they’re not too good at it, or maybe a little too good. The junk they’re pumping out is stronger than the normal stuff and a real danger to anyone who uses it. 

We’ve been hired to knock out their operation and destroy whatever drugs stashes are on site. Armed guards are protecting the place, but they don’t seem too skilled. Our surveillance teams observed one of them almost shoot himself in the foot. Can’t say for certain, but odds are they won’t give a pro like you too many problems.  

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

missions.name: Covalex Nyx Hard RecoverCargo
missions.overview:
Hi, it's El.

Need a hauler for a job ASAP. One of our contractors had a "personal emergency" and had to ditch their ship and it seems like they're not coming back. Not ideal, really.

Good news is the cargo is still intact, at least according to the tracker. It'd be a huge win for me if you could finish the job by grabbing the cargo at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and bringing it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Seems like this was a pretty big one, you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move it all. Really appreciate your help.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

missions.name: Launch Surprise Attack
missions.overview:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Need someone to take out a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and deal with the escort ships protecting it. They’ve already interfered with several of our ongoing operations and have become a real problem across several of Eckhart Security cases. Not sure what their endgame is, but it won’t matter once you deal with them.

We’ve let slip that we will be working a job over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> which should serve as bait to draw them out. The spot is ideal for an ambush because of the <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> that’s a perfect place to power down and hide until you’re ready to strike. If you’re available, the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and its escorts should be passing through soon.   

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. The main contractor will also receive a bonus payment of <EM4>5 MG Scrip</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

missions.name: Legendary Info?
missions.overview:
Don’t know if you’ve heard, but there’s a bunch of ships over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> surrounding a burnt-out ship. You curious why? I know we are.
Think you can get in that wreck, grab the blackbox, and get out? We’ll pay you for it.

Based on the number of sketchy ships in the area, you should bring some friends with to watch your ass, unless you’re some crazy solo act, but we’d prefer if you actually survived this so you can drop off the blackbox at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for us. 

But hey, your call. As long as it gets done.

-Bit Zeros

missions.name: Ling Family Rookie Cargo Haul - Medium Scale
missions.overview:
Hi, 

Guess the folks at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> are planning a party and need help acquiring everything in a timely manner. You’ll need to make multiple pick-ups for this one, including one in Nyx to grab some Jynx gin. Not sure if you’ve ever had the stuff, but it’s a Nyx specialty. Some folks can’t get past that it glows pink, but I love it. Got a truly unique kick to it.

Here are the pick ups:  

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

[MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]     

Please remember to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, as you’ll be handling cargo containers up to <EM4>8 SCU</EM4>.  

  
Happy Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

missions.name: Little Heavy Lifting at [DESTINATION]
missions.overview:
Got a bunch of boxes sitting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that have to be moved to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Seems easy enough, right? Well, guess it ain’t. 

The idiot who was supposed to move these things threw out his back trying to carry all of ‘em at once. So, you know, maybe bring a <EM4> handheld tractor beam</EM4> and try taking ‘em one at a time like a normal person. But, hey, don’t let me tell you how to do your job. Just get it done. 

Stows out.

missions.name: Covalex DeliveryPilot Stanton AgriculturalPingalaProtaFlourine Rank1
missions.overview:
Hi,

Need a reliable contractor to pick up some packages for us and deliver them to their destination.

This route is a longer one so make sure you have enough fuel and don't forget a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

And not sure what you were planning on flying, but you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

missions.name: Looking For Trouble
missions.overview:
I’ve noticed an uptick in attacks on Headhunter ships and it's got me feelin' jumpy. Got an important resupply shipment that we can’t afford to lose, and need help determining what route to send it. I’ve strung together a few potential spots that I’d set up in if I was gonna hit ‘em. Any chance you could visit and clear out any lowlifes that may be hiding there? 

The route starts at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. After you scan it and clear whatever’s there, I’ll send you to a few other areas that could work. I’ve been hearing people have been rolling through these spots, so would be smart to <EM4>bring a friend</EM4> to watch your back.

You make it to the end and I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>14 Council Scrip</EM4> as thanks. 

- Stows

missions.name: Luminalia 1
missions.overview:
Happy Luminalia!

I have a huge favor to ask. Thanks to some very ill timed maintenance issues, my ship is out of commission for at least a week and I won't be able to finish delivering presents to everyone on my gift list.

Looked into using FTL but with their holiday pricing I'll end up paying more credits than what the gifts cost! 

Figured I would see if you're interested in helping me out. I get my gifts delivered on time and you get some extra Luminalia spending credits. 

The gifts are wrapped and waiting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. [DESCRIPTIONSETUP].

Thanks in advance and may your light glow a little brighter this year!

Sincerely,
[GIFTSENDER]

missions.name: Lost But Not Gone
missions.overview:
A rival crew was able to get their hands on our delivery routes and now they have one of my cargo ships pinned down at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

Now the ship’s sitting there being guarded by a full crew of these assholes. They must be waiting for someone to show up with a transport ship, but you’re going to get there first.

Head there with a crew of your own and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to take the goods away. Make sure they’re the best people you got. It’d be a mistake to underestimate these bastards.

Ghost them and bring my cargo back to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll make sure you’re seriously comp’d for this.

-Twitch

missions.name: Luminalia 2
missions.overview:
Happy Luminalia!

I have a huge favor to ask. Thanks to some very ill timed maintenance issues, my ship is out of commission for at least a week and I won't be able to finish delivering presents to everyone on my gift list.

Looked into using FTL but with their holiday pricing I'll end up paying more credits than what the gifts cost! 

Figured I would see if you're interested in helping me out. I get my gifts delivered on time and you get some extra Luminalia spending credits. 

The gifts are wrapped and waiting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. [DESCRIPTIONSETUP].

Thanks in advance and may your light glow a little brighter this year!

Sincerely,
[GIFTSENDER]

tactical_analysis.content: Quantum Nav Mode: Mantén escudos al 100% mientras cargas el motor para saltos rápidos.
Atmospheric Efficiency: Sube a 10km en ángulo de 45° antes de saltar en planetas con atmósfera.

missions.name: Making the Most of a Bad Situation
missions.overview:
Just got a comm from the pilot who was transporting some gear for me and it sounded like they got jumped while on the call. I need someone to head to their location, grab the four packages that are still left inside their ship and bring them back to me.

Before they cut out, they told me that the ships that attacked them weren’t your standard transporters. These assholes are rocking some serious weaponry. Bring a crew, get my shit, and take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. This whole thing is such a mess that I’d be willing to fork out some extra creds if you can get this done.

-Twitch

tactical_analysis.content: Quantum Nav Mode: Mantén escudos al 100% mientras cargas el motor para saltos rápidos.
Atmospheric Efficiency: Sube a 10km en ángulo de 45° antes de saltar en planetas con atmósfera.

missions.name: Master Rank - Direct Bulk Cargo Haul
missions.overview:
Hiya, 

Looking for a hauler willing to make a run to Ruin Station. Know hauls to Pyro can give some people pause, but this is one we do regularly to help supply the station. I’ve also confirmed that everything on the cargo manifest is above board. 

If you’re interested, the cargo is ready for pick up at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.  Make sure you bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can hold <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4> otherwise it might be a little rough.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

tactical_analysis.content: Quantum Nav Mode: Mantén escudos al 100% mientras cargas el motor para saltos rápidos.
Atmospheric Efficiency: Sube a 10km en ángulo de 45° antes de saltar en planetas con atmósfera.

missions.name: HaulCargo AToB Interstellar Bulk Ag Med Iodine
missions.overview:
Hiya, 

Here’s the deal, I need someone good for a special run. We’ve got an important client that’s threatening to take their business elsewhere, because their deliveries are consistently missing cargo. They’re demanding that 100% of the cargo be delivered on this run, or they won’t pay. Since this was before my time and my supervisor wants to show that it won’t happen again, they agreed with this. Anyway, I think you might be a good fit. 

If you’re willing to take that risk too, here are all the pertinent details. The cargo can be collected from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and delivered to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Looks like the largest cargo container you’ll need to handle is <EM4>24 SCU</EM4>, so be sure to bring a ship big enough and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to help you move those containers around.  
 
Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service, 

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. missions.name: Master Tracker License Certification
missions.overview:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: [SYSTEM] 
RISK ASSESSMENT: Extreme
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: As acknowledgment of your expertise in the craft, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn a Master Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend Extreme-Risk Targets (ERT). These are criminals who travel in sub-capital ships with heavy escorts. This class of bounty only gets assigned to the most experienced of trackers.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend an ERT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

tactical_analysis.content: Quantum Offset: Salta a un OM cercano al objetivo primero. Inicia el combate a < 2km.
Desync Warning: En 4.7, las Valkyries enemigas teletransportan. No uses misiles a menos de 3km.
Ballistics Meta: Los AD5B siguen siendo intocables por su capacidad de penetración de escudos.

missions.name: Covalex Nyx Medium RecoverCargo
missions.overview:
Hey El here,

Got a weird one for you. I was checking the delivery stats for the past week and noticed some discrepancies. Seems we have a couple of deliveries marked as fulfilled but the cargo trackers are still showing as active.

One of these is located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> so I was hoping you could fly over and get to the bottom of this. The order says the hauler was using a ship that could carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> so make sure you have the same. A <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> is a must for this one too.

That cargo needs to be delivered yesterday, so as soon as you've got it take it to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I'll get your payment sorted for you.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno

missions.name: Med. Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials
missions.overview:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

[LOCATION] For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

tactical_analysis.content: Operation Breaker (Nyx): Usa el monorraíl para llegar al Warehouse inmediatamente.
Sinergia Shubin: Sube a Rep 2 para desbloquear el Láser de Minería Masivo.
Equipa un traje térmico industrial. Las estaciones Breaker en Nyx tienen fugas de refrigerante.

missions.name: Member Hauler Needed for Medium Shipment
missions.overview:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------   

They're doing a clean out at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and have a bunch of <EM4>8 SCU</EM4> or smaller waste containers that needs to be hauled out to a few different spots. (Don't ask me why. They're paying us is all I know.)

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]

And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

tactical_analysis.content: Quantum Nav Mode: Mantén escudos al 100% mientras cargas el motor para saltos rápidos.
Atmospheric Efficiency: Sube a 10km en ángulo de 45° antes de saltar en planetas con atmósfera.

missions.name: Minor Repairs Needed: [LOCATION]
missions.overview:
Hi,

One of our outposts at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is in need of some light repairs. The folks onsite have estimated that you’ll need <EM4>three fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to fix up to three or so pipes.</EM4>

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Thanks again for your help,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

missions.name: Minor Repairs Needed: Chawla's Beach
missions.overview:
A nearby outpost of ours at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is suffering from some mechanical failures and could use repairing. Our usual technician is off on another job so we're looking to hire an outside contractor.

We will need <EM4>three fuses replaced</EM4> and if you could bring a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough canisters of RMC to fix around three pipes</EM4> that should take care of the rest.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher

missions.name: Minor Repairs Needed: Chawla's Beach
missions.overview:
A nearby outpost of ours at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is suffering from some mechanical failures and could use repairing. Our usual technician is off on another job so we're looking to hire an outside contractor.

We will need <EM4>three fuses replaced</EM4> and if you could bring a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough canisters of RMC to fix around three pipes</EM4> that should take care of the rest.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

missions.name: Mjr. Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
missions.overview:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

[LOCATION] Many of these ores are extremely rare and difficult to find, detectable only when a rock has been cracked open.

Reminder, all the <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

tactical_analysis.content: Operation Breaker (Nyx): Usa el monorraíl para llegar al Warehouse inmediatamente.
Sinergia Shubin: Sube a Rep 2 para desbloquear el Láser de Minería Masivo.
Equipa un traje térmico industrial. Las estaciones Breaker en Nyx tienen fugas de refrigerante.

missions.name: Moderate Repairs Needed: [LOCATION]
missions.overview:
Hello,

We've received word that a devastating storm hit <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> which caused some damage to the structures. Our technician on site is still trying to figure out what they can fix but they can’t get everything. If you bring <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to repair around five pipes</EM4>, we should be able to handle any remaining repairs.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

tactical_analysis.content: Quantum Nav Mode: Mantén escudos al 100% mientras cargas el motor para saltos rápidos.
Atmospheric Efficiency: Sube a 10km en ángulo de 45° antes de saltar en planetas con atmósfera.

missions.name: Moderate Repairs Needed: Chawla's Beach
missions.overview:
If you happen to be in the area, please read this.

Citizens for Prosperity is looking for a qualified mechanic to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> with the required supplies and perform some repairs.

As it stands, you’ll need <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to repair five pipes or so.</EM4> That should help us get the outpost functional again. We'll compensate you for your time and materials.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

missions.name: More than a Max
missions.overview: If you want to move many things. Hercules ship, very good for that. Wikelo even know souli back in Protectorate that started to use. Very big. Wikelo can give you similar version if you get what Wikelo need. Look at list and tell me.

Equipa un traje térmico industrial. Las estaciones Breaker en Nyx tienen fugas de refrigerante.

missions.name: Most Special Wolf
missions.overview: You have been good trade partner for Wikelo. Offer you this very special Wolf mod. Make trade even better - Bring me what I want and I give you the special Wolf AND Antium Armor AND a VOLT LMG. Very good deal for my very good customer.

missions.name: My Deepest Condolences
missions.overview:
Whilst we pride ourselves on our efficiency and general cleanliness when it comes to our work, sometimes our contractors can get a little carried away themselves. Circumstances surrounding a former contractor’s death, and more importantly, the target, are somewhat unclear to us.

We’ll need you to travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and locate <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>’s body so we can deliver clear confirmation to our client. As for the former contractor… you needn’t concern yourself with them. Arrangements for disposal have already been made.

Sincerely,

Vaughn

tactical_analysis.content: Quantum Nav Mode: Mantén escudos al 100% mientras cargas el motor para saltos rápidos.
Atmospheric Efficiency: Sube a 10km en ángulo de 45° antes de saltar en planetas con atmósfera.

missions.name: Need a CFP taken down
missions.overview:
Need an available trigger to take down a target in a CFP outpost. They're a real piece of work named [TARGET]. Old school merc filled with lead-pipe cruelty. 

Heard they're posted over at [LOCATION]. Swing by and take them out. Try not to cause too much damage. They're the target, not anyone else.

Stows out.

tactical_analysis.content: Quantum Offset: Salta a un OM cercano al objetivo primero. Inicia el combate a < 2km.
Desync Warning: En 4.7, las Valkyries enemigas teletransportan. No uses misiles a menos de 3km.
Ballistics Meta: Los AD5B siguen siendo intocables por su capacidad de penetración de escudos.

missions.name: Need Resource for Research
missions.overview:
To all available contractors,

Our research team at at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> is working tirelessly on solving the current ‘Regen Crisis’ and addressing the issue of unstable imprints. Their work has produced promising results, but a lack of a key resource is impeding their ability to run further experiments. 

We’ve received word from our supplier that increased demand combined with lower mining yields means that we won’t receive our scheduled shipment for another few months. Our research team can’t wait that long, and we’re hoping you can help.      

The resource is hard to come by, but we have it on good authority that the old Hathor mining facilities were built in areas with a high concentration of the ore. Since Hathor went defunct not long after establishing their operations in- system, there’s a good chance that activating one of these mining lasers could provide you with what we need.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

missions.name: FoxwellEnforcement BombingRun Stanton H
missions.overview:
An opportunity has presented itself for a client to take action against a group of criminals who have been harassing their business.

According to reports, this group of outlaws are currently laying low at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. The client thinks this is a good time to catch them off guard and bring them to justice. The job is to take out their fuel tanks and putting an end to their smuggling operations once and for all.

These folks are not to be underestimated. You better bring some backup and fly low to avoid the turrets. Priority as always is the fuel tanks.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement

missions.name: Orange Level Contract: Handle Security Threat
missions.overview: We've received intel from [INFORMANT] that local criminal elements are operating [MONITOR_COUNT] around [LOCATION] to eavesdrop on security forces. As such, authorization has been given to enlist private contractors to help eliminate these devices.  You'll need to carefully scan the area once you arrive to identify the exact location of the [MONITOR_COUNT]. Since they passively skim information, they can be tricky to find.\n\nWord of warning, outlaws tend to rig these PDC Monitors with defensive protocols to automatically back up the data when attacked, so once you start shooting, you'll need to destroy them all quickly before the transfer can finish.

missions.name: Orange Level Contract: Potential Security Threat
missions.overview:
Several unknown ships have been spotted in areas frequented by haulers delivering goods for our client. They’re worried these ships are monitoring their haulers in preparation for an ambush, so they’ve hired us to patrol the area. 

Start by going to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan it to ensure it’s clear. After that, we’ll send you to some other areas to scan for potential threats. We recommend that you bring a <EM4>wingman</EM4> and plenty of supplies to be ready to handle whatever might come your way.     

Also know that successfully completing this contract will earn the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>14 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Good luck,

missions.overview:
The folks at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> are under attack and need our support. Their ships in the wider area are being targeted and there’s a growing concern that this is only a precursor to something bigger.  

The situation is evolving, but I’m being fed constant updates on what’s going on and will keep you informed as the contract progresses.

Good luck,

missions.name: Orange Level Contract: Return the Favor
missions.overview:
Recently, a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> baited Foxwell forces with a bogus rescue beacon. By the time our forces realized what was happening, a squad of ships unleashed a devastating attack and only one Foxwell contractor survived. Their scan logs identified the bait ship, and we’ve had scouts monitoring them ever since.

Our surveillance has revealed the squad has a regular flight pattern that we think we can exploit. There’s a sizable emission cloud at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that makes it an ideal spot to post up. Think you have what it takes to handle this for us? 

It’ll be you against the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, other large craft, and a sizable escort. Wish I could be more specific than that but this crew regularly rotates ships in and out of the squad. Would be smart to bring some support, so you don’t get overwhelmed by their numbers.   

Complete the job and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>8 MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

We’ve got clients reporting outlaw attacks on ships around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They got locked down tight and anybody heading in or out is a target. Any attempts to solve the issue have just been met with more outlaw reinforcements appearing.

missions.name: Orange Level Contract: Spring a Trap
missions.overview:
Foxwell has been tracking a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> used by outlaws and discovered a pattern to its movements. The ship should be passing by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> soon.

Looking for a contractor willing to hustle there, hide in the emission cloud, and then spring the trap when the time is right. There’s usually escort ships with the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. Careful not to jump the gun and blow your cover. The element of surprise is crucial from what I’ve read.

Pull this off and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>5 MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement

It seems that a couple of different small-time gangs have decided to pool their resources and start doing coordinated attacks. Alone, they weren't much, but all together they're proving to be a serious threat that has to be dealt with.

Recruit some backup you can rely on and the fly over to [LOCATION]. Once you attack the initial gang members you find there, the other groups will arrive to support them. Make sure you wait around to take out all of them.
 
Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

missions.name: FoxwellEnforcement BombingRun Stanton M
missions.overview:
We're in need of a sharp contractor for a hit and run operation. Client says some local thugs have been congregating in concerning numbers and we have been tasked with disrupting their base of operations.

Get on over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and take out their fuel tanks. If you're successful we can set these folks plans back a while, and most importantly, without having to deal with them directly.

Reports are showing there's a couple of ships buzzing around the area and some defense turrets. Just focus on the fuel tanks and you should be alright.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement

missions.name: Our Version of The Truth
missions.overview:
I’m not gonna give you the whole backstory of what this person has done to us, but all you need to know is that some scumbag is trying to get a payout for a ship crash and the insurance company wants to see the blackbox recording to make sure everything is “above board”.

We’re not gonna let that happen though.

Snatch that blackbox at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and bring it to us instead so we can do some “creative editing” on the recording.

Apparently, this area is a bit of a hot zone. Probably why they staged the accident there. You should probably bring some backup so you don’t get ghosted before you can bring the blackbox to us at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Bit Zeros

missions.name: Outlaw attack at [LOCATION]
missions.overview:
Several CFP clusters near [LOCATION] just got hit by a group of outlaws led by [TARGET]. We're looking for any available combat specialists to help retake the outposts.

I can provide the locations upon acceptance but we need to clear out the main outpost and satellite installations from all hostile forces and take out [TARGET] as it's unlikely that they will not cease their hostilities if they escape.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

missions.name: Headhunters BombingRun Stanton S
missions.overview:
We've heard news that a new gang are planning a bombing run on a place over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They figure if they can take out the fuel supplies there then it's theirs for the taking.

But little do they know that we're gonna send you in first to blow the fuel tanks so we can claim the place before they do. If it all goes to plan, we can clear the location out and stick it to that gang at the same time. Two birds, one stone.

Only problem is this place is armed to the teeth. Bring a crew and get those fuel tanks out of action. We'll take care of the rest.

-Stows out

missions.name: Paid Target in CFP
missions.overview:
Headhunters are launching an attack near [LOCATION]. This ex-Marine asshole named [TARGET] has been sending their mercs to clear out nearby encampments if they don't surrender their weapons.

While all the security have been greenlit, [TARGET] has been singled out. In their last raid, they beat a squatter to death for talking back. Turns out that squatter was the cousin of one of our Clips, so they're paying extra to make sure justice is done.

Watch yourself though, [TARGET] may be a scumbag who has this coming, they're still ex-military so they won't be easy to take down.

-Stows

Citizens for Prosperity

missions.name: Patrol Dangerous Sector
missions.overview:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has received intelligence that outlaws are planning to launch an attack on a target within the UEE. In an effort to prevent this from happening, we need a contractor to patrol a sector we believe these outlaws are using to prepare for their attack.

Outlaw activity in this sector is higher than normal, so InterSec recommends that you <EM4>bring backup</EM4>. When ready, dispatch to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. Once you've confirmed that the entire sector is clear, the main contractor will receive a bonus of <EM4>14 MG Scrip.</EM4> 

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

missions.overview:
We’ve noted an increase in traffic along one of the travel lanes we monitor. Chances are that we won’t be the only ones paying attention. I’d like you to head out there in a combat-ready ship and make sure there are no outlaws attempting to take advantage of this sense of security.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>4 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

missions.name: Patrol to Prevent Possible Attack
missions.overview:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has been tracking increased outlaw activity in certain sectors of the system. This activity in conjunction with other intelligence leads us to believe that outlaws are planning an attack on elements traveling from the UEE. We're aiming to patrol these sectors and disrupt any plans before they can be put into action.

Currently, we need someone who can help patrol a highly dangerous sector. Once you've accepted the mission, you can proceed to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. From there, we'll send you along a specific route with additional waypoints to scan. Complete the patrol and we'll send the main contractor a bonus of <EM4>18 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Due to the high probability of attack and general threat level of local outlaws, we recommend <EM4>recruiting trusted wingmen</EM4> to provide combat support.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

missions.name: Patrol Travel Lanes
missions.overview:
We need someone with combat experience to patrol a travel lane for us. Over the years, we’ve found that it's good to get out there and make ourselves visible. Sometimes a pilot like yourself traveling through an area is enough to deter any potential outlaws. But in case you run into any that are feeling a bit more ambitious, a ship ready for combat is recommended.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. After you’ve scanned all the waypoints and ensured that the route is secure, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>2 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

missions.name: Patrol Vanduul Hunting Ground
missions.overview:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: There's a growing concern that Vanduul hunting parties are pushing further into Nyx. The first line of defense against this encroachment is increased patrols. InterSec has identified a sector that has seen an uptick in Vanduul activity and are looking for someone to patrol the region and provide an update on it.

You'll begin your patrol at a <EM4>location marker</EM4> sent to your HUD and then scan a series of waypoints along a designated route. The Vanduul ships in this sector are highly skilled and aggressive, so InterSec highly recommends that you <EM4>bring several combat-ready ships along as backup</EM4>.

InterSec understands the immense danger you'll be under on this patrol, so we'll send a special bonus of <EM4>24 MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor once the sector is clear.      

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

missions.overview:
Need someone solid to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and finish a delivery for me. The last contractor got themselves perished and now my stash is sitting in the back of their ship.

-Twitch

missions.name: Plug a traitor
missions.overview:
This shit saddens me. Not sure if you've ever crossed paths with [TARGET] in your dealings with us. Thought they were a real good one. Been with the Headhunters for years, but something must have happened because they went running to CFP for protection. Sold out some of our brothers and sisters along the way.

All the Judges are furious and wants blood. That's where you come in. Go to [LOCATION], find [TARGET], and kill them.

Doesn't have to be anything fancy. Just want the result.

Damn shame.

Stows out.

missions.name: Potential Assassin Victim: [TARGET]
missions.overview:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP50122
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Need an operative to help us potentially prevent a death. An informant has reported an active hit issued for <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and fears the worst, but the client has hired us like us to look into it. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Last known location was <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Head over there and see if the person mentioned by our client is still with us. If they’re not, examine the body closely so we can report back to them with details of their death.

Additional Notes:
This contract has been flagged as <EM4>combat-likely</EM4> so prepare accordingly.

missions.name: Precision Strike on [TARGET]
missions.overview:
Got a line on a bounty named <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. Someone spotted them along with known criminal accomplices at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Need you to get there before they get going. 

<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> has a reputation for only showing their face in places with civs. Really need you to take down this bounty without there being any civilian collateral damage. Foxwell can’t afford to be caught in the shitstorm that would erupt over the loss of innocent life. 

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

missions.name: Preliminary Bounty: [TARGET]
missions.overview:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: Stanton
RISK ASSESSMENT: Medium
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: This preliminary bounty is being offered to you as a formal evaluation of your skills. Successful completion of this contract will lead to additional bounty work being made available. 

It is believed that the target will be on foot and well armed, so be prepared to engage in a firefight. Additionally, there may be other hostiles forces at the site, while they should not be your primary focus, you may have to engage with them while in pursuit of the target.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

tactical_analysis.content: Tactor Beam Looting: Mueve las cajas completas a tu nave y revísalas en puerto seguro.

Blueprint Drop: Enemigos con armadura dorada tienen 15% drop de Blueprints de Grado A.

missions.name: Primo Target
missions.overview:
Got a platinum target that needs to get taken down. [TARGET] is a heavy hitter who's one of the people running security for Citizens for Prosperity. Although [TARGET] might have forgotten, the Headhunters remember their work with a merc company a few years ago that lead to the deaths of five brothers and sisters. We want blood for blood.

They've been spotted poking around [LOCATION], so you should still be able to find them there.

They're a mean bastard, so bring some friends but make sure they end up dead.

Stows out.

missions.name: Pro Tem Escapee Bounty Contract
missions.overview:
Hey There,

My name is Braden Corchado and I'm a logistics officer for Northrock Service Group, the leading independently-owned security firm operating in the Stanton system. I may have reached out already, but we try to make it a point of approaching anyone who meets our high standards and encouraging them to complete a pro tem contract. 

You can't do much better than become a Northrock contractor. We have a solid reputation for offering challenging and interesting work at a higher rate of pay then many of our competitors in system. 

Now, to get approved, you will need to apprehend one [TARGET]. They have recently escaped from the detention center and your job will be to track them down before they can disappear completely off the grid. 

A little hint is that it's safe to assume that the target is going to go try to clear their record. I recommend triangulating your search between the detention center they escaped from and locations where they can hack into the record system.

Get this done and we'll see about getting you more work.

Hope to hear from you soon, 

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

missions.name: Pro Tem Suspect Apprehension
missions.overview:
Hi,

Hope you don't mind, but I was made aware of your Bounty Hunters Guild status and wanted to reach out and see if you'd be interested in contracting with Northrock Service Group, one of the top rated private security firms in the system.

If you are, the first step would be to complete a pro tem suspect apprehension. It's less of an evaluation and more of a chance to make sure that we can have a good working relationship. 

The suspect you would be after is known as <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. They are known to be particularly elusive so you may have your work cut out for you.

Hope to hear from you soon, 

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

missions.name: Protect [LOCATION] from XenoThreat Incursion
missions.overview:
Urgent!

XenoThreat is mobilizing for a massive incursion to wipe [LOCATION] off the map. You’re their only hope of enduring this assault and protecting them from XenoThreat’s cruelty.

I know I’m asking you to put yourself in the line of fire, but this system won’t change unless people like you are brave enough to take on these dangers. No amount of credits could measure up to how much good you’d be doing by stepping in.

If you’re willing and able to take on this mission, make sure to take some allies with you. XenoThreat will certainly send in stronger reinforcements once they realize they’re taking losses.

We believe in you.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

missions.name: Protection against [TARGET]
missions.overview:
Reports indicate that [LOCATION] has come under attack from a group of armed individuals led by a notorious outlaw named [TARGET]. There have been multiple reported deaths and injuries, so Citizens for Prosperity has been looking for qualified combat operatives to provide some support. 

Though we don't advocate conflict resolution through violence, we believe that the group will disperse if [TARGET] is not there to lead them.

missions.name: QV Breaker Station Mining Rights (Exclusive)
missions.overview:
CONTRACT: Mining Rights Transfer
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS:
Shubin Interstellar prospectors have recently discovered the location of an abandoned QV Planetary Service Breaker Station near the Keeger belt. These stations were originally used by the defunct company to harvest valuable resources from inside asteroids but knowledge of their exact locations has been lost over the years. 

While this particular station is offline, our scout team believes that it could be made functional again with the necessary repairs. Additionally, if it was brought back online, there's already a resource-heavy asteroid in place ready to be cracked by the station's mining laser. 

Unfortunately, with all the various challenges that come with operating in Nyx, Shubin doesn't currently have the available bandwidth to handle the aforementioned repairs ourselves. This however has created an opportunity for an interested independent mining operation such as yourself. 

<EM4>TERMS*: </EM4>
We are making available the <EM4>exclusive mining rights</EM4> to this QV Breaker Station. Upon purchase, we will provide the coordinates of the station to only you and your crew. Your team will then be free to head there with a <EM4>mining vessel</EM4>, restore the <EM4>station's mining laser</EM4> to an operational status, crack the asteroid, and <EM4>harvest the resources</EM4> inside. 

Please note that while we guarantee that these coordinates will be exclusive to you, we cannot assure that other interested parties, such as outlaws, may not discover the station's location on their own. Caution is advised. 

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed

The UEE can't have another incident like what happened with ASD so they're eager for us to <EM4>recover the cryopods</EM4> and deliver them to <EM4>the freight elevator at [DESTINATION]</EM4>.

While the Shattered Blade members present at the site might offer resistance, they are not the focus of you mission. Deal with them as needed and get the cryopods. 

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

missions.name: Covalex Nyx Super RecoverCargo
missions.overview:
Hey,

Only looking for contractors who are the best of the best for this one. One of our most valued clients is expecting an incredibly important shipment which is now seriously overdue.

Here at Covalex, we pride ourselves on treating all of our clients equally, offering outstanding levels of service regardless of what we're delivering. That being said, if we lose this contract someone's gonna be in hot water and I really can't afford for that person to be me.

The tracker is reporting that the last contractor's ship is over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Don't take any chances with this one, you'll need a ship that can hold <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to collect it all.

Deliver the shipment to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we can put this whole mess behind us. And you'll make a sizeable heap of credits in the process. Not bad, right?

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

missions.overview: Shooting can be messy. Red Human Blood everywhere. Not a problem with this shotgun. Splashes blends right in! I give it to you if you give me everything I want on list. Good trade.

tactical_analysis.content: Operation Breaker (Nyx): Usa el monorraíl para llegar al Warehouse inmediatamente.
Sinergia Shubin: Sube a Rep 2 para desbloquear el Láser de Minería Masivo.
Equipa un traje térmico industrial. Las estaciones Breaker en Nyx tienen fugas de refrigerante.

missions.name: Red Level Contract: Ambush Attack Squad
missions.overview:
Foxwell got word from an important client that outlaws have put together a squad that’s been stalking the system with sub-capital ships and escort fighters. Our client is concerned that if left unchecked, outlaws will create more of these attack squads and destabilize system security. We’ve been hired to wipe out this group before that happens. 

We need a confident and skilled contractor for this task. Good news is that we have a plan in place. One of the ships used by this squad, a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, was stolen from our client, who’s still able to track its movements. They’ve shared the location data with us and we’ve discovered that this squad often goes by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We’ve scouted the location and discovered a large emission cloud makes an ideal spot for an ambush.  

Not going to lie, this isn’t going to be easy. We don’t have any additional forces available to deploy, so it would be good to bring your own support. 

You manage to pull this off, I've arranged for a bonus payment of <EM4>12 MG Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

tactical_analysis.content: Quantum Offset: Salta a un OM cercano al objetivo primero. Inicia el combate a < 2km.
Desync Warning: En 4.7, las Valkyries enemigas teletransportan. No uses misiles a menos de 3km.
Ballistics Meta: Los AD5B siguen siendo intocables por su capacidad de penetración de escudos.

missions.name: Red Level Contract: Clear PAFs, Recover Cargo, and Deliver to OLP
missions.overview:
Something weird is going on at the old Hathor mining facilities. Both the platform alignment facilities and orbital laser platforms have been abandoned and gathering dust for decades, but outlaws have started using them as a base of operations.

We’ve been hired by a concerned party who’s recently lost a lot of important cargo to one such gang. Currently, their stuff is stashed at <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4> and <EM4>[LOCATION2]</EM4>, but there’s a growing fear that the gang may be offloading their goods soon. That’s why we’ve been hired to hit both of those Hathor facilities, retrieve the cargo from the freight elevators, and bring it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

Here’s the specifics on what to grab from each location. Doesn’t matter in what order you do this, as long as it all gets collected and delivered. Just be sure to bring a ship that can handle <EM4>32 SCU cargo containers</EM4>.  It also wouldn't hurt to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you.   

- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]
- [LOCATION 3]

Foxwell hasn’t been able to scout these locations, but if I were you, I’d expect to face some serious armed resistance. Best bring a bunch of gear and some friends.

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

tactical_analysis.content: Quantum Nav Mode: Mantén escudos al 100% mientras cargas el motor para saltos rápidos.
Atmospheric Efficiency: Sube a 10km en ángulo de 45° antes de saltar en planetas con atmósfera.

missions.name: FoxwellEnforcement BombingRun Stanton S
missions.overview:
We are looking for a highly competent mercenary team to assist with a challenging demolition for a VIP client.

The outlaws operating at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> has been identified as a threat of growing concern in the area and to help deal with this situation your team is being tasked with taking out the fuel tanks at the location. 

However, it won't be as easy as just slipping in and out - expect to deal with multiple hostiles and turrets that will be expecting you. The stronger your crew the better your chances at completing this operation successfully.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement

missions.name: Red Level Contract: High-Risk Security Patrol
missions.overview:
A client needs our help. Outlaws are roaming certain sectors where they do business and attacking anyone they come across. Our client has already lost several ships and can’t afford to lose anymore. 

We need someone to patrol those areas and draw out any hostile forces. The job begins with you heading to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scanning. Then we’ll share a handful of other patrol points for you to scan. 

From the sound of it, these packs of ships feature skilled and aggressive pilots. Best be ready to rumble if you run into any of them. Would be good to have at least <EM4>two trusted pilots</EM4> by your side for this one.

At the end of a successful patrol, the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>18 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Stay chilly,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

missions.name: Red Level Contract: Secure Threatened Space
missions.overview:
Need a battle-hardened pilot for an important patrol. A prominent client is fed up with outlaws targeting their ships and satellites. We’ve been hired to scan the areas in question and deal with any hostile forces. The patrol begins at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD before moving to a number of other locations we’ll expect you to clear.

Not sure what you’ll run into out there, but based on intel shared by the client, they’re frequently seeing fighter groups of five to seven ships roaming the region. Some even have larger ships leading the charge. That means you better be ready for a serious fight. If you can, try to recruit at least <EM4>three friends</EM4> to the cause. Even a seasoned pilot will need all the help they can get against this crew.   

Since this is going to be a tough one, the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>24 MG Scrip</EM4> at the end of the patrol.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement

missions.overview:

After opening a file, we started tracking the ship’s movements and noticed that it frequently passes an emission cloud near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. The crew of the [TARGET] is aggressive and battle hardened.        

You get this taken care of for us and there's a bonus payment of <EM4>16 MG Scrip</EM4> in it for the main contractor.

Good luck,

missions.name: Red Wind Challenging Cargo Recovery
missions.overview:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

We’re having trouble completing a hauling mission and need a reliable contractor who has experience working in dangerous environments to complete the job. Just as a heads up, the cargo is in an abandoned ship surrounded by multiple, highly dangerous outlaws. We strongly advise you bring some backup with you and <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to retrieve the client’s goods. Details follow:

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

Since this is a bit risky, we’re offering proportionate pay. I’ll leave it up to you to decide how to distribute it to your crew.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

Lima Endicott

Citizens for Prosperity

missions.overview:
If you have any work that's going to be bringing you to one of those old QV Breaker Stations in the Keeger Belt, we have something else that we could use your help on while you're there.
 
We've recently been contacted by the People's Alliance to assist with an initiative to help prepare these abandoned stations for repairs. Unfortunately, a Valakkar infestation is creating serious problems for not only the stations' infrastructure, but also for the chances of them being brought back online one day. Due to Valakkar's status as an invasive species, we have decided that culling them is the only viable option.
 
Reduce the Valakkar numbers at any of the old QV Breaker Stations and we will offer you payment.
 
Best,
 
Wanda Werkheiser

Contract Manager

Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

missions.name: ShipWaveAttack ClearOutHostiles Nyx M
missions.overview:
It feels that whenever we start to make real progress in the system, the outlaws are there to push one step back. We had recently cleared out [LOCATION] only to learn that a new outlaw gang has taken root there, using it as a launching point for various criminal enterprises. 

Since we can't afford to let this rot spread, you and a few support ships are being charged with heading there to clear out all the gang's packs. After you deal with one pack, be sure to wait until all of the hostile packs have been dealt with.

Know that you are helping to make a real difference,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

missions.name: Repel Raiders
missions.overview:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

There’s a serious problem brewing for one of our clients at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They’ve been warned that a highly skilled outlaw crew has their sights set on overrunning and occupying that location. We’ve been hired to make sure that doesn’t happen. 

Need a contractor to deploy to the location immediately. Based on the intel provided by the client, this won’t be a walk in the park. We strongly advise you to bring allies and plenty of supplies to help ward of the impending attack.   

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

tactical_analysis.content: Quantum Nav Mode: Mantén escudos al 100% mientras cargas el motor para saltos rápidos.
Atmospheric Efficiency: Sube a 10km en ángulo de 45° antes de saltar en planetas con atmósfera.

missions.name: Reprisal Attack
missions.overview:
A squad of ships recently shanked one of our convoys, and ten credits says they’re gonna try and do it again. Looking for someone to launch a reprisal attack before that can happen.  

We’ve ID’d the idiots as consisting of several large craft and a sizable escort. We believe the leader is flying a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and set that ship as the primary target. Since it’s a sizable and aggressive squad, a surprise attack seems like a smart play. They often pass by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, which has an emission cloud to hide in. Be smart and patient then strike when the time is right. 

Unless you fancy yourself a real ace, it’s probably best to bring some friends. Maybe you can entice folks by letting them know they can pick through the wreckage for valuables once the deed is done.

And on top of that, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>8 Council Scrip</EM4> to sweeten the pot.

Stows out.

tactical_analysis.content: Quantum Offset: Salta a un OM cercano al objetivo primero. Inicia el combate a < 2km.
Desync Warning: En 4.7, las Valkyries enemigas teletransportan. No uses misiles a menos de 3km.
Ballistics Meta: Los AD5B siguen siendo intocables por su capacidad de penetración de escudos.

missions.name: Reputation Management
missions.overview:
Some assholes are refusing to pay us what we’re owed. Problem is, these idiots are bragging about it. Had they kept it quiet, we could’ve taken care of this more surgically, but now we need to send a message.

The fools are operating from [LOCATION]. We need them all gone. Make it as loud as you can. We’ll send your payment once everyone’s taken care of.

- Stows out.

missions.name: Requesting Help
missions.overview:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Clear Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Got an emergency request from Associated Science & Development for any available operators to report to [LOCATION] and deal with some hostiles who have overtaken one of their facilities. 

Once on site, you will need to engage and eliminate any hostile elements. ASD has indicated that this facility provides shuttle services to one of their embedded research centers but were very clear that you are not authorized to travel there. Trespassers will be shot and you will be no exception, so stick to the prescribed AO.

This contract is non-negotiable.
